format_info.description: JSON-RLE (Run-Length Encoding) format for TSIC world generation

how_to_read.step_1: Each layer has a 'palette' (array of colors) and 'color_data' (RLE compressed data)
how_to_read.step_2: RLE format: [[paletteIndex, count], ...] where paletteIndex references palette array
how_to_read.step_3: Decompress: for each [index, count], repeat palette[index] for count tiles
how_to_read.step_4: Tiles are stored in row-major order: index = y * world_size + x
how_to_read.step_5: Use color_mappings below to convert colors to enum values for each layer type
